probes.name: http_apex
probes.evidence: curl -I http://vibe-trading.space/ returned HTTP 200 from openresty/Spaceship parking infrastructure, not the Vibe-Trading Space Worker

probes.name: dns_apex
probes.evidence: A records still resolve to Spaceship parking IPs 34.216.117.25 and 54.149.79.189; www returns ENOTFOUND

probes.name: cloudflare_auth
probes.evidence: Keychain metadata search found no CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN/CF_API_TOKEN service; wrangler whoami says not authenticated

probes.name: d1_remote_create
probes.evidence: npx wrangler d1 create vibe_trading_space exits non-zero because CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is required in non-interactive mode

probes.name: worker_deploy
probes.evidence: npx wrangler deploy builds successfully, then exits non-zero because CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is required

probes.name: worker_dry_run
probes.evidence: npx wrangler deploy --dry-run passed and read 17 files from dist

probes.name: local_d1_analytics
probes.evidence: Wrangler local /api/analytics accepted and persisted one event; local D1 SELECT COUNT(*) returned events=1

probes.name: local_paid_gate
probes.evidence: Wrangler local /api/planner returned HTTP 402 payment_required with product-domain pricing and checkout paths

resumePlan.requiredOwnerOrPlatformAction: Provide Cloudflare login/session or Keychain service CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN with Workers Scripts Edit, D1 Edit, and Zone DNS Edit permissions; then move vibe-trading.space DNS from Spaceship parking to Cloudflare Worker routing.
commands: update wrangler.toml database_id with the created D1 id
submit sitemap to GSC/Bing/IndexNow after live HTTPS passes
resumePlan.expectedSuccessSignal: HTTPS apex/www serve Vibe-Trading Space, no Spaceship parking content, runtime reports cloudflare_d1, and completion gate has no non-backlink blockers

completionLedger.evidence: Cloudflare token/DNS/HTTPS remain blocked after live probes and deploy attempt
